classification.reasoning: The document contains a clear 'PRESCRIPTION' header, patient information, diagnosis, treatment plan, and doctor's signature, which are all characteristic of a medical prescription.

markdown:
## METRO HEALTH CLINIC

Dr. P. Banerjee, MD (Internal Medicine) Registration No: WB/34567/2015

Kolkata, West Bengal

## PRESCRIPTION

Patient Name:

Anita Desai

Date:

20-06-2026

Age/Gender:

31 / Female

## Diagnosis

Morbid Obesity (BMI 37)

## Treatment Plan

- Bariatric Consultation
- Customised Diet Plan
- Weight Management Program
- Monthly Nutrition Monitoring

## Advice

- Follow calorie restricted diet
- Weekly weight monitoring
- Follow-up after 30 days

Signature

Dr. P. Banerjee WB/34567/2015
